steps.title: Focus on the shared trait
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a similarity between Watch Your Step and Golden Connection. The useful shared facts are that both are LED light sculptures and both were made by Marisol Vega.

steps.title: Remove one-sided comparisons
steps.content: A describes only Watch Your Step, B emphasizes their size difference, and D contrasts their materials. The remaining choice links both works as LED sculptures by the same artist. The answer is C.
